title: Detail Engineer – Software (Robotics and Industrial Automation)
description:
**Job Title:** 
      Detail Engineer – Software
   

  

**Location:** 
      Bangalore, India
   

  

**Experience:** 
    3–4 Years
   

  

**Department:** 
   Product Development – Robotics and Industrial Automation
   

  

**Reports to:** 
     Application Engineer (who reports to Product Development Head)
   

  

**Job Summary**
 A proactive and hands\\-on
 **Detail Engineer – Software** 
 to support the development and implementation of control and automation software for robotic and industrial automation systems. This role involves PLC/HMI programming, software testing, system integration and documentation. Working closely with the Application Engineer, the candidate will contribute to building intelligent automation solutions including robotic arms, motion systems and digital control platforms. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in industrial software development, programming logic and on\\-ground commissioning.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Control Software Development:**
* Develop and implement PLC, HMI, and SCADA logic using platforms such as Siemens, Rockwell, Beckhoff, or B\\&R.
* Design software architecture and function blocks aligned with system requirements.
* Conduct simulation and logic testing for verification of control sequences.


**System Integration**
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams (mechanical, electrical, instrumentation) for seamless integration of software with hardware systems.
* Participate in I/O checks, device configuration, and communication setup.
* Support installation, FAT, SAT, and on\\-site commissioning activities.


**Documentation \\& Support**
* Prepare detailed documentation including logic diagrams, I/O lists, software manuals, and commissioning reports.
* Maintain version control of software releases and change logs.
* Provide feedback on control logic optimization and system performance.


**On\\-Ground Engineering Support**
* Assist during system bring\\-up, troubleshooting, and debugging during factory and site trials.
* Coordinate with vendors and internal teams for hardware\\-software interfacing and control system testing.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Electrical / Electronics / Mechatronics / Instrumentation / Computer Engineering.
* 3–4 years of experience in PLC/HMI software development for robotics, automation or special\\-purpose machines (SPMs).
* Proficient in programming industrial automation platforms (e.g., Siemens TIA Portal, Rockwell Studio 5000, Codesys).
* Understanding of control systems, motion control, and industrial communication protocols (e.g., Modbus, Profinet, Ethernet/IP).
* Exposure to industrial robotics, SCADA systems or vision systems is a plus.
* Strong team orientation, structured approach to problem\\-solving and ability to meet project timelines.

 Background

title: AI/ML Engineering Intern
description:
**About Thinklude** 




 Thinklude is a B2B SaaS platform that bridges communication gaps between Deaf and Hearing individuals. Using a proprietary AI system, the platform enables real\\-time, accurate conversion between speech and sign language across more than 125 languages. Thinklude works with organizations to build accessible products, services, and environments by integrating intelligent accessibility solutions into real\\-world systems.
 



 Our mission is to make communication universally accessible by combining advances in artificial intelligence, multimodal systems, and assistive technology.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for an AI / ML Engineer Intern who is excited to work on applied machine learning problems in accessibility technology. In this role, you will work on LLM\\-driven systems, natural language processing, and computer vision models that power Thinklude’s core products, including sign language recognition and multimodal communication systems.
 



 You will contribute to research, model development, and deployment pipelines while collaborating with engineers and product teams to build scalable AI systems used in real deployments.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Research, develop, and deploy AI/ML models including LLM\\-based solutions for Thinklude’s core products
* Build and maintain LLM pipelines including fine\\-tuning, evaluation, and deployment workflows
* Collect datasets, train models, and develop end\\-to\\-end deep learning pipelines
* Develop systems for NLP, computer vision, and multimodal AI applications
* Write clean, maintainable, and well\\-documented code
* Troubleshoot and debug issues across the machine learning and deployment stack
* Participate in code reviews and collaborate with the engineering team on model improvements



  





**Requirements** 



* Proven experience with Python and ML frameworks such as PyTorch and Hugging Face Transformers
* Strong understanding of Object\\-Oriented Programming concepts
* Experience working with Natural Language Processing and/or Computer Vision (experience in both is preferred)
* Hands\\-on experience with Large Language Models including fine\\-tuning, prompt engineering, Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation (RAG), or agent frameworks
* Familiarity with version control systems such as Git
* Strong analytical and problem\\-solving abilities
* Good communication and collaboration skills
* Experience working with LLM\\-based coding agents or AI\\-assisted development tools



  





**Role Details** 



* Remote internship
* Duration: 6 months
* Stipend: ₹25,000 – ₹30,000 per month
* Flexible work hours

title: Senior Engineer
description:
**Why should you choose us?** 




 Rakuten Symphony is reimagining telecom, changing supply chain norms and disrupting outmoded thinking that threatens the industry’s pursuit of rapid innovation and growth. Based on proven modern infrastructure practices, its open interface platforms make it possible to launch and operate advanced mobile services in a fraction of the time and cost of conventional approaches, with no compromise to network quality or security.
 



  





 Rakuten Symphony has operations in Japan, the United States, Singapore, India, South Korea, Europe, and the Middle East Africa region. For more information, visit: https://symphony.rakuten.com
 



  





 Building on the technology Rakuten used to launch Japan’s newest mobile network, we are taking our mobile offering global.
 



  





 To support our ambitions to provide an innovative cloud\\-native telco platform for our customers, Rakuten Symphony is looking to recruit and develop top talent from around the globe. We are looking for individuals to join our team across all functional areas of our business – from sales to engineering, support functions to product development.
 



  





 Let’s build the future of mobile telecommunications together!
 



  





 About Rakuten Group, Inc. (TSE: 4755\\) is a global leader in internet services that empower individuals, communities, businesses and society. Founded in Tokyo in 1997 as an online marketplace, Rakuten has expanded to offer services in e\\-commerce, fintech, digital content and communications to 2 billion members around the world. The Rakuten Group has over 30,000 employees, and operations in 30 countries and regions. For more information visit
 
 https://global.rakuten.com/corp/
 
 .
 



  





**Role Overview :** 




  





**Senior Engineer Platform** 
 , you will provide technical leadership in the design, implementation, and operation of an enterprise\\-scale Kubernetes platform across highly regulated on\\-premises environments. This senior role requires deep L3\\-level expertise in both Linux systems engineering and Kubernetes architecture. You will define the strategic direction for virtualization and cluster lifecycle management, platform reliability, and advanced Linux management, working closely with security and development teams to deliver a secure, observable, and highly performant platform at extreme scale.
 



  





**Technology ,Tools and Hardware \\-** 




  





**Core:** 
 Kubernetes, Linux (RHEL/Rocky), Prometheus, Grafana, CICD ,Docker, Helm, Ansible, Git, Supermicro, Dell iDRAC, and enterprise monitoring/logging systems.
 



  





**Responsibilities :** 



* **Build, and operate** 
 a highly available and fault\\-tolerant Kubernetes platform (control plane and worker nodes) with a focus on resiliency and scale .
* Drive
 **advanced Linux systems engineering** 
 (L3/kernel level) across the fleet including deep kernel tuning, complex systemd administration, advanced network configurations, enterprise storage solutions, rigorous security hardening and expert level performance problem resolution .
* **Lead collaboration** 
 with application development teams on production readiness, resource management optimization, pod disruption budgets, and advanced auto\\-scaling strategies .
* **Define and enforce** 
 cluster lifecycle management processes (strategic provisioning, complex upgrade methodologies, robust backup/DR strategies, long\\-term capacity planning, and data migration) .
* **Implementation of advanced network and security infrastructure** 
 : CNI solutions, advanced ingress controllers, comprehensive service mesh architectures, internal PKI systems.
* **Oversee enterprise storage solutions** 
 (CSI), manage artifact lifecycle policies, and optimize registry performance.
* **Drive the application of SRE principles** 
 and define and track key service level indicators (SLIs), service level objectives (SLOs), and error budgets.
* Implement and monitor key SRE metrics (Four Golden Signals) to measure service performance:
 **availability** 
 ,
 **latency** 
 ,
 **error rate** 
 ,
 **traffic** 
 , and
 **saturation.**
* **Lead high\\-impact cost and performance optimization** 
 initiatives. Conduct rigorous capacity and scalability testing to accommodate extreme workloads.
* Track incident metrics such as
 **MTTD (Mean Time to Detect)** 
 ,
 **MTTR (Mean Time to Resolution)** 
 , and
 **MTBF (Mean Time Between Failures)** 
 to continuously improve your incident response processes and system resilience .



  





**Mandatory requirements :** 



* **6 to 18 years of relevant telco industry experience** 
 in infrastructure engineering or SRE,with a proven track record of managing large\\-scale, complex environments.
* **Deep L3 Linux expertise** 
 (performance analysis, complex networking, storage architecture, security internals) and expert level container runtime knowledge.
* **Proficiency in bare metal Kubernetes deployments** 
**and Virtualization** 
 in Development environments .
* **Expert\\-level proficiency** 
 in host\\-level networking, DNS architecture, TLS management, load balancing strategies, and advanced container networking .
* **Proven application of SRE practices** 
 at scale : major incident leadership, capacity/scalability strategy development, advanced change management.
* **Architectural knowledge** 
 of security hardening principles, advanced RBAC models, pod security mechanisms, and secret management infrastructure .



  





**Education:** 




 • Bachelor’s degree in Telecommunications, Electronics \\& Communication, Computer Science, or a related engineering discipline.
 



  





**RAKUTEN SHUGI PRINCIPLES:** 




 Our worldwide practices describe specific behaviours that make Rakuten unique and united across the world. We expect Rakuten employees to model these 5 Shugi Principles of Success.
 


* **Always improve, always advance.** 
 Only be satisfied with complete success \\- Kaizen.
* **Be passionately professional.** 
 Take an uncompromising approach to your work and be determined to be the best.
* **Hypothesize \\- Practice \\- Validate \\- Shikumika.** 
 Use the Rakuten Cycle to success in unknown territory.
* **Maximize Customer Satisfaction.** 
 The greatest satisfaction for workers in a service industry is to see their customers smile.
* **Speed!! Speed!! Speed!!** 
 Always be conscious of time. Take charge, set clear goals, and engage your team.

title: Senior Backend Developer
description:
Ctruh is looking for a
 *deeply technical, hands\\-on* 
 Senior Backend Engineer \\- someone who can architect systems in the morning, write production\\-grade code in the afternoon, and scale infrastructure to power millions of 3D and XR experiences.
 



  





 You will own the entire backend ecosystem: architecture, APIs, databases, infrastructure, performance, and reliability. This is not an oversight or management\\-only position \\- it is a builder’s role where you design, code, deploy, and optimize mission\\-critical systems.
 



  





 You will make foundational decisions, build distributed systems that handle massive 3D processing workloads, and lead our backend engineering direction as we scale globally.
 



  





 What You’ll Build
 



**System Architecture \\& Design** 



1. Architect highly scalable backend systems from the ground up
2. Define technology choices: frameworks, databases, queues, caching layers
3. Evaluate microservices vs monoliths based on product stage
4. Design REST, GraphQL, and real\\-time WebSocket APIs
5. Build event\\-driven systems for asynchronous processing
6. Architect multi\\-tenant systems with strict data isolation
7. Maintain architectural documentation and technical specs



  





**Core Backend Services** 



1. Build high\\-performance APIs for 3D content, XR experiences, analytics, and user interactions
2. Create 3D asset processing pipelines for uploads, conversions, and optimization
3. Develop distributed job workers for CPU/GPU\\-intensive tasks
4. Build authentication/authorization systems (RBAC)
5. Implement billing, subscription, and usage metering
6. Build secure webhook systems and third\\-party integration APIs
7. Create real\\-time collaboration features via WebSockets/SSE



  





**Data Architecture \\& Databases** 



1. Design scalable schemas for 3D metadata, XR sessions, and analytics
2. Model complex product catalogs with variants and hierarchies
3. Implement Redis\\-based caching strategies
4. Build search and indexing systems (Elasticsearch/Algolia)
5. Architect ETL pipelines and data warehouses
6. Implement sharding, partitioning, and replication strategies
7. Design backup, restore, and disaster recovery workflows



  





**Scalability \\& Performance** 



1. Build systems designed for 10x–100x traffic growth
2. Implement load balancing, autoscaling, and distributed processing
3. Optimize API response times and database performance
4. Implement global CDN delivery for heavy 3D assets
5. Build rate limiting, throttling, and backpressure mechanisms
6. Optimize storage and retrieval of large 3D files
7. Profile and improve CPU, memory, and network performance



  





**Infrastructure \\& DevOps** 



1. Architect AWS infrastructure (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, ElastiCache)
2. Build CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments and rollbacks
3. Use IaC tools (Terraform/CloudFormation) for infra provisioning
4. Set up monitoring, logging, and alerting systems
5. Use Docker \\+ Kubernetes for container orchestration
6. Implement security best practices for data, networks, and secrets
7. Define disaster recovery and business continuity plans



  





**Integration \\& APIs** 



1. Build integrations with Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento
2. Design webhook systems for real\\-time events
3. Build SDKs, client libraries, and developer tools
4. Integrate payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay)
5. Implement SSO and OAuth for enterprise customers
6. Define API versioning and lifecycle/deprecation strategies



  





**Data Processing \\& Analytics** 



1. Build analytics pipelines for engagement, conversions, and XR performance
2. Process high\\-volume event streams at scale
3. Build data warehouses for BI and reporting
4. Develop real\\-time dashboards and insights systems
5. Implement analytics export pipelines and platform integrations
6. Enable A/B testing and experimentation frameworks
7. Build personalization and recommendation systems



  





**Technical Stack** 




**Backend Languages \\& Frameworks** 



1. Primary: Node.js (Express, NestJS), Python (FastAPI, Django)
2. Secondary: Go, Java/Kotlin (Spring)
3. APIs: REST, GraphQL, gRPC



  





**Databases \\& Storage** 



1. SQL: PostgreSQL, MySQL
2. NoSQL: MongoDB, DynamoDB
3. Caching: Redis, Memcached
4. Search: Elasticsearch, Algolia
5. Storage/CDN: AWS S3, CloudFront
6. Queues: Kafka, RabbitMQ, AWS SQS



  





**Cloud \\& Infrastructure:** 



1. Cloud: AWS (primary), GCP/Azure (nice to have)
2. Compute: EC2, Lambda, ECS, EKS
3. Infrastructure: Terraform, CloudFormation
4. CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CircleCI
5. Containers: Docker, Kubernetes



  





**Monitoring \\& Operations** 



1. Monitoring: Datadog, New Relic, CloudWatch
2. Logging: ELK Stack, CloudWatch Logs
3. Error Tracking: Sentry, Rollbar
4. APM tools



  





**Security \\& Auth** 



1. Auth: JWT, OAuth 2\\.0, SAML
2. Secrets: AWS Secrets Manager, Vault
3. Security: Encryption (at rest/in transit), TLS/SSL, IAM



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



1. 5\\+ years in backend engineering with strong system design expertise
2. Experience building scalable systems from scratch
3. Expert\\-level proficiency in at least one backend stack (Node, Python, Go, Java)
4. Deep understanding of distributed systems and microservices
5. Strong SQL/NoSQL design skills with performance optimization
6. Hands\\-on AWS cloud experience
7. Ability to write high\\-quality production code daily
8. Experience building and scaling RESTful APIs
9. Strong understanding of caching, sharding, horizontal scaling
10. Solid security and best\\-practice implementation experience
11. Proven leadership and mentoring capability



  





**Highly Desirable** 



1. Experience with large file processing (3D, video, images)
2. Background in SaaS, multi\\-tenancy, or e\\-commerce
3. Experience with real\\-time systems (WebSockets, streams)
4. Knowledge of ML/AI infrastructure
5. Experience with HA systems, DR planning
6. Familiarity with GraphQL, gRPC, event\\-driven systems
7. DevOps/infrastructure engineering background
8. Experience with XR/AR/VR backend systems
9. Open\\-source contributions or technical writing
10. Prior senior technical leadership experience



  





**Technical Challenges You’ll Solve** 



1. Designing large\\-scale 3D asset processing pipelines
2. Serving XR content globally with ultra\\-low latency
3. Scaling from thousands to millions of daily requests
4. Efficiently handling CPU/GPU\\-heavy workloads
5. Architecting multi\\-tenancy with complete data isolation
6. Managing billions of analytics events at scale
7. Building future\\-proof APIs with backward compatibility



  





**Location \\& Work Culture** 



1. Location: Bengaluru
2. Schedule: 6 days a week, (5 days\\-in\\-office, Saturdays WFH)
3. Culture: Builder mindset, strong ownership, technical excellence



  





**Compensation** 



1. Competitive salary based on experience
2. Significant stock options (4\\-year vesting)
3. Performance\\-based bonuses tied to system reliability and delivery



  





 The Ideal Candidate:
 



 You are a backend engineer first, architect second \\- someone who still loves writing code, debugging complex issues, and solving scaling problems hands\\-on.
 



  





 You’ve built systems from the ground up and lived through the growing pains of scaling. You think in systems, evaluate trade\\-offs clearly, and design architectures that are practical, resilient, and future\\-proof.
 



  





 You’re highly comfortable discussing microservices vs monoliths, choosing the right database for a use case, designing APIs, and introducing caching or queues when appropriate. You’ve made decisions that you later optimized or re\\-architected — and learned from both.
 



  





 You stay close to the code. You pair\\-program, review PRs, jump into production incidents, and ship features alongside your team. You enjoy designing a high\\-level architecture and then implementing the most critical parts yourself.
 



  





 You balance ambition with pragmatism. You know when to use managed services, when to build custom solutions, and how to ship iteratively while maintaining system stability. Most importantly, you’re a builder \\- someone excited to architect the backend foundations of a fast\\-growing XR platform, optimize performance for massive 3D workloads, and define infrastructure that supports global, real\\-time immersive experiences.

title: C# developer
description:
A California\\-based company is rolling out a new social commerce app \\-\\- the first in the US to fuse social, marketplace, currency and AI into one cohesive consumer platform.
 



  





 We're currently experiencing rapid customer adoption and revenue ramp, and (in the coming months) are looking to open an office in Pune, India.
 



  





 In anticipation of that, we're seeking a C\\# developer that can start working
 **remotely** 
 immediately – on a full\\-time basis.
 



  





**About the platform:** 




  





 Co\\-founded by the only other team (other than Facebook) to previously dominate the U.S. college market social networking space, we're using our prior experience to roll out this new game\\-changing highly\\-patented platform on college campuses too. After saturating the college market we'll then open it to everyone else.
 



  





 Our marketing approach utilizes local feet\\-on\\-the\\-street “Territory Owners” all over the world. They pay us for the opportunity to own their local territory business and share in the revenue opportunities from their territory. Thousands of Territory Owners are now joining us each month, as we have started our marketing efforts to attract them.
 



  





 Our platform consists of 3 products: The Social app and Marketplace mobile apps (C\\# back\\-end, React Native front\\-end), and our web\\-based CRM back\\-office for the Territory Owners (C\\# back\\-end and React/MVC front\\-end).
 



  





 Key Responsibilities:
 



  





**A) C\\# Platform Development:** 




 Design, develop and maintain high\\-performance backend services in
 **C\\#** 
 that power our mobile apps, marketplace systems, and CRM platform. Write clean, scalable code and continuously improve system performance, reliability and security across our backend infrastructure.
 



  





**B) AI\\-Accelerated Development:** 




 Leverage modern
 **AI coding tools (ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor, etc.)** 
 to dramatically accelerate development speed, prototyping, debugging and refactoring. We are looking for developers who are highly skilled at using AI to increase productivity and ship features significantly faster than traditional development workflows.
 



  





**C) Collaboration with the Engineering Team:** 




 Work closely with other developers, QA and product leadership to plan, build and release new features quickly. Participate in the
 **daily stand\\-up at 4:30pm IST** 
 , contribute technical ideas, and help ensure that features are delivered efficiently and at high quality.
 



  





**D) System Architecture \\& Integration:** 




 Help design backend architecture and APIs that support our
 **React Native mobile apps and CRM systems** 
 , integrate with third\\-party services (payments, messaging, crypto, etc.), and support a rapidly scaling global user base.
 



  





**E) Continuous Improvement:** 




 Identify opportunities to improve development speed, code quality, automation and deployment pipelines. We value engineers who constantly optimize how work gets done.
 



  





**Compensation would include:** 




  





 1\\) Monthly cash compensation
 



 2\\) Additional cash bonus (monthly profit share)
 



 3\\) Significant ownership package so that you’re participating in the financial upside generated from your hard work, focus and success. If you are successful with us, this will be the last job you have where you're not the CEO or venture capitalist.
 



  





 We’re moving very quickly to fill these roles. If you're available now to work full\\-time
 **remotely** 
 starting immediately – and feel like it's a good fit \\-\\- let us know.
 



  





 The next step will be to speak with one of our co\\-founders.

title: Principal Software  Engineer, Application  Development
description:
Position Summary:
   

  

 Designs, develops and delivers services to integrate external processes and data within an enterprise and between organizations by linking applications to better support business processes, reducing cycle times and costs. Analyzes, documents and understands the IT architecture, business processes and data that exist within the enterprise. Determines which applications and data stores need to share information. Determines the degree of integration necessary to optimize business processes and the correct architecture and enabling technology (e.g., middleware) to achieve the integration. May provides support for Eletronic Data Interchange (EDI) database analysis, design, and operations. Establishes and maintains communications within organization and with partners. Conducts and manages product evaluations. Provides product installation, configuration, and training. Performs systems maintenance to update records, specifications, and operating procedures of B2B systems. Maintains EDI account transaction activities.
   

  

 What you bring to the role:
   

  

 Seasoned professional individual contributor. Works independently with limited supervision. May manager projects/processes. Coaches and reviews the work of lower level professionals. Problems faced are difficult and often complex. Influences others regarding policies, practices and procedures.
   

  

 Provides solutions to a variety of complex technical and business matters. Will champion significant projects, programs and business initiatives using demonstrated creativity and ingenuity. May assist more junior staff members with aspects of their job.
   

  

 Incumbents provide a leadership role for the work group through knowledge in his/her area of specialization. Generally free to determine work priorities based on general direction from managers.
   

  

 Specialist in technical or business skills. Individuals with a customer focus have developed the acumen to cultivate and develop lasting customer relations. Four year college degree (or additional relevant experience in a related field). Minimum 5 years functional experience including a minimum of 3 years specific experience. Ability to make significant contribution to processes and systems.
